narrative:
Clay 2 (Genoa) (precinct in Ottawa County) has 616 registered voters, with 52.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.4%, a modest Republican lean of 4.7 percentage points.
